name: Chaos magic shoal: a sigil shoaling technique where multiple sigils are fired simultaneously into the unconscious. FSPLIT: the magician compresses multiple intentions into abstract sigils, splitting the unified desire-space into individual glyph-nodes. FFUSE: simultaneous firing (gnostic release) reconstitutes all intentions as a single shoal — they swim together into manifestation. VINIT: undifferentiated desire before sigilization. TANCH: the gnostic peak (the moment of firing). AFWD: individual sigil creation. AREV: forgetting each sigil. ENGAGR: a sigil that simultaneously means everything (its full intention) and nothing (abstract squiggle).

phase_0.domain_name: Chaos magic shoal: a sigil shoaling technique where multiple sigils are fired simultaneously into the unconscious. FSPLIT: the magician compresses multiple intentions into abstract sigils, splitting the unified desire-space into individual glyph-nodes. FFUSE: simultaneous firing (gnostic release) reconstitutes all intentions as a single shoal — they swim together into manifestation. VINIT: undifferentiated desire before sigilization. TANCH: the gnostic peak (the moment of firing). AFWD: individual sigil creation. AREV: forgetting each sigil. ENGAGR: a sigil that simultaneously means everything (its full intention) and nothing (abstract squiggle).
phase_0.boundary_condition: the gnostic peak (the moment of firing) that contains and closes the shoal

VINIT.justification: void/uninitialized state before any intention is named or shaped

TANCH.chosen_element: the gnostic peak (the moment of firing)
TANCH.justification: terminal anchor that contains the whole shoal system and marks its boundary

AFWD.justification: forward morphism from undifferentiated desire to a specific glyph-node

AREV.justification: reverse/descent morphism that withdraws conscious attention from the sigil

CLINK.chosen_element: sequential charging of sigils before firing
CLINK.justification: composition of individual sigil creations into a chain of intent

IMSCRIB.chosen_element: the sigil that is both itself and its meaning
IMSCRIB.justification: self-reference: the sigil recognizes itself as a glyph and as intention

FSPLIT.chosen_element: the magician compresses multiple intentions into abstract sigils
FSPLIT.justification: splits the unified desire-space into individual glyph-nodes (branch A: each sigil's form, branch B: each sigil's meaning)

FFUSE.chosen_element: simultaneous firing (gnostic release) reconstitutes all intentions as a single shoal
FFUSE.justification: reconstitutes the multiple sigils into one shoal that swims together into manifestation

EVALT.justification: affirmative/success state where intentions are realized

EVALF.chosen_element: the shoal fails to manifest (sigils scatter)
EVALF.justification: negative/failure state where intentions dissipate without effect

ENGAGR.chosen_element: a sigil that simultaneously means everything (its full intention) and nothing (abstract squiggle)
ENGAGR.justification: paradox: both full meaning and no meaning held together

IFIX.chosen_element: the permanent record of the shoal in the unconscious
IFIX.justification: irreversible fixation of the sigil cluster into the deep mind

phase_2.split_element: the magician compresses multiple intentions into abstract sigils
phase_2.fuse_element: simultaneous firing (gnostic release) reconstitutes all intentions as a single shoal
phase_2.fuse_result: unified desire-space (the shoal as a single gestalt)

phase_3.void_description: 00 — undifferentiated desire before any sigil is formed
phase_3.both_description: 11 — a sigil that simultaneously means everything and nothing

steps.domain_action: Step 1 IMSCRIB: the magician recognizes the self as the source of desire
Step 2 AREV: the magician descends into the unconscious, forgetting conscious intent
Step 3 FSPLIT: the magician compresses multiple intentions into abstract sigils, splitting desire-space into glyph-nodes
Step 4 AFWD: each sigil is created as a distinct glyph
Step 5 FFUSE: simultaneous firing reconstitutes all sigils into a single shoal
Step 6 CLINK: the sigils are composed into a chain of charging before firing
Step 7 IFIX: the shoal is permanently recorded in the unconscious
Step 8 IMSCRIB: the magician recognizes the self as having manifested the shoal

phase_5.compiler_frontend: the magician's will that translates intentions into sigil forms
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: gnostic resonance between sigils within the shoal
phase_5.memory_mechanism: the unconscious as storage for sigil records
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: the timing of firing (gnostic peak) determined by the magician's trance state
phase_5.alfs_store: the primordial sigil (first ever created) as canonical bootstrap store

phase_6.cycle_cost: the magician's gnostic energy expended per firing
phase_6.post_cycle_state: the shoal recorded in the unconscious (lower potential, higher order)
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the gnostic release conserves entropy by converting potential into structured record without net loss
